name: STRATEGIC ACQUISITIONS INC /NV/
summary: Strategic Acquisitions, Inc. is a Nevada-incorporated private lending company providing U.S. Dollar-denominated loans collateralized by digital assets, primarily Bitcoin. The company serves small businesses and individuals in Asia and Europe with term loans ranging from $500,000 to $5,000,000 and durations of 3 to 36 months. As of July 2024, all outstanding loans were repaid and lending operations were temporarily ceased. The company generates revenue from interest income and loan origination fees.
